Wanwadi is a residential locality in Pune, Maharashtra, India. It is located in the north-eastern part of the city and is near the Mula–Mutha River. The locality is well-connected to major parts of the city via public transport. It is close to major business and shopping hubs such as Nagar Road and the Hinjewadi IT Park. The locality is home to many educational institutions such as Abasaheb Garware College and many reputed schools. It is also home to a number of hospitals, banks, and other service providers. The area has a pleasant climate throughout the year and is surrounded by greenery. It is also close to the Baner Hill, which is a popular tourist spot. Moreover, it also enjoys the convenience of various outlets such as supermarkets, grocery stores, restaurants, and cafes. All these factors make Wanwadi an ideal place to live in Pune.

Nestled among hills and lush greenery, Mohammed Wadi is one of the fastest developing suburbs of Pune. Close to nature with picturesque surroundings, it is a coherent residential property destination. The location has an advantage of being well connected to various key localities in Pune via local as well as interstate highways and expressways. With the development of MG Road, NH-4 and NH-9; the residents enjoy an easy access to workplace hubs like Hadapsar and the IT Park in Phursungi. The most vital road of the place, NIBM Road connects Mohammed Wadi to significant destinations like Pune International Airport, Pune Railway Station and Bus Depot. With the widening of Katraj-Kondhwa-Phursungi-Solapur Highway, Mohammed Wadi's all-round connectivity is increasing dramatically. Proximity to Wanowrie and other major IT companies is boosting the infrastructure development of the place even further. The SP Infocity and Magarpatta city is just a short drive from the locality thus prompting many working professionals to reside around Mohammed Wadi. Reputed educational institutions like DPS, Bishops and Singhad Institutes are just a stone's throw away from the area. Mohammed Wadi also offers a myriad of entertainment and leisure options in terms of Seasons Mall, Amanora Park Town and Corinthian's Club located in the vicinity.

Kondhwa is a fast developing residential area in south eastern Pune with easy access to nearby IT, industrial and business parks that provide employment for residents. The area has a constant requirement of more housing for the people working in the IT and industrial parks. Kondhwa is clean and green and has plenty of parks and gardens that provide environment relief for its residents. 86% of all the property available in Kondhwa are apartments and 94% of all the apartments are 1,2 and 3 Bedroom apartments. There are 44 new residential projects coming up in Kondhwa and 9 out of them are still under construction. Some of the reputed builders with attractive new projects in Wandhwa include the Salarpuria Sattva group, the Kohinoor group, the Eisha group and Kanchan Developers. Kondhwa is located at the junctions of 5 important roads that include the Mumbai and the Satara Highways and is also located less than 9 kms from the Pune Raiway station. The airport is also not very far at 15 kms. The localities close to Kondhwa are Pune Cantonment, Swargate, Magarpatta and Hadapsar and are all good localities to live in.

Baner situated in North West Pune is a great blend of residential and commercial properties. Baner is surrounded by Balewadi, Aundh, Pashan, Sus, Mahalunge, Wakad, and Hinjewadi. Baner is a rapidly developing suburb in Pune due to its proximity to industrial zones and IT hubs. Hinjewadi’s development as an IT hub has boosted the rental hub at Baner. Hinjewadi IT Hub is just 9km from Baner. Baner also enjoys excellent road connectivity via Baner road, Pashan Sus road, and NH-48. Its proximity to the Mumbai-Pune expressway is an added advantage. Pune International Airport is just 18 km away from Baner and Shivajinagar Railway station is the nearest railway station. Baner has excellent social infrastructure as it is surrounded by well-known schools, hospitals, restaurants, and shopping malls, all within proximity. Baner is close to many IT parks such as Pune IT Park, Rajiv Gandhi Infotech Park. It is also close to Industrial hubs such as PCMC and Pirangut. Baner is also known as Pune’s most glamorous neighborhood. Many residential and commercial projects are coming up at Baner. Baner is being developed under Smart City Mission and a proposed 23.3 km Metro line is also planned on Line 3.

Locality Guide
for Mohammed Wadi, Pune
Share
+
25 More
Nestled among hills and lush greenery, Mohammed Wadi is one of the fastest developing suburbs of Pune. Close to nature with picturesque surroundings, it is a coherent residential property destination. The location has an advantage of being well connected to various key localities in Pune via local as well as interstate highways and expressways. With the development of MG Road, NH-4 and NH-9; the residents enjoy an easy access to workplace hubs like Hadapsar and the IT Park in Phursungi. The most vital road of the place, NIBM Road connects Mohammed Wadi to significant destinations like Pune International Airport, Pune Railway Station and Bus Depot. With the widening of Katraj-Kondhwa-Phursungi-Solapur Highway, Mohammed Wadi's all-round connectivity is increasing dramatically. Proximity to Wanowrie and other major IT companies is boosting the infrastructure development of the place even further. The SP Infocity and Magarpatta city is just a short drive from the locality thus prompting many working professionals to reside around Mohammed Wadi. Reputed educational institutions like DPS, Bishops and Singhad Institutes are just a stone's throw away from the area. Mohammed Wadi also offers a myriad of entertainment and leisure options in terms of Seasons Mall, Amanora Park Town and Corinthian's Club located in the vicinity.

Wanwadi is a residential locality in Pune, Maharashtra, India. It is located in the north-eastern part of the city and is near the Mula–Mutha River. The locality is well-connected to major parts of the city via public transport. It is close to major business and shopping hubs such as Nagar Road and the Hinjewadi IT Park. The locality is home to many educational institutions such as Abasaheb Garware College and many reputed schools. It is also home to a number of hospitals, banks, and other service providers. The area has a pleasant climate throughout the year and is surrounded by greenery. It is also close to the Baner Hill, which is a popular tourist spot. Moreover, it also enjoys the convenience of various outlets such as supermarkets, grocery stores, restaurants, and cafes. All these factors make Wanwadi an ideal place to live in Pune.

In the Indian state of Maharashtra, the city of Pune has a neighbourhood called Yerawada. Yerawada was formerly known as Yeraoda during the British Raj. One of the parts of Pune with the highest population density is Yerawada.It can be found at the start of the Ahmednagar Highway and on the route to the former Pune Airport in Lohagaon.From Bund Garden, you can travel to this location by crossing the Mula-Mutha River on the Yerawada Bridge.The most famous prisoner to have served time there was Mahatma Gandhi, who did so for a number of years during India's struggle for independence. The district's total area is 15.642 square kilometres. Pune district is bordered to the north and east by Ahmadnagar district, to the south and east by Solapur district, to the south and south-east by Satara district, to the west and north-west by Raigad district. Pune, India, is known for having some of the best people, weather, and cost of living in the entire country. This is the largest jail in the State of Maharashtra. The most notable people to be incarcerated at the jail is Mahatma Gandhi, who spent several years there during India's struggle for freedom.

Nestled among hills and lush greenery, Mohammed Wadi is one of the fastest developing suburbs of Pune. Close to nature with picturesque surroundings, it is a coherent residential property destination. The location has an advantage of being well connected to various key localities in Pune via local as well as interstate highways and expressways. With the development of MG Road, NH-4 and NH-9; the residents enjoy an easy access to workplace hubs like Hadapsar and the IT Park in Phursungi. The most vital road of the place, NIBM Road connects Mohammed Wadi to significant destinations like Pune International Airport, Pune Railway Station and Bus Depot. With the widening of Katraj-Kondhwa-Phursungi-Solapur Highway, Mohammed Wadi's all-round connectivity is increasing dramatically. Proximity to Wanowrie and other major IT companies is boosting the infrastructure development of the place even further. The SP Infocity and Magarpatta city is just a short drive from the locality thus prompting many working professionals to reside around Mohammed Wadi. Reputed educational institutions like DPS, Bishops and Singhad Institutes are just a stone's throw away from the area. Baner situated in North West Pune is a great blend of residential and commercial properties. Baner is surrounded by Balewadi, Aundh, Pashan, Sus, Mahalunge, Wakad, and Hinjewadi. Baner is a rapidly developing suburb in Pune due to its proximity to industrial zones and IT hubs. Hinjewadi’s development as an IT hub has boosted the rental hub at Baner. Hinjewadi IT Hub is just 9km from Baner. Baner also enjoys excellent road connectivity via Baner road, Pashan Sus road, and NH-48. Its proximity to the Mumbai-Pune expressway is an added advantage. Pune International Airport is just 18 km away from Baner and Shivajinagar Railway station is the nearest railway station. Baner has excellent social infrastructure as it is surrounded by well-known schools, hospitals, restaurants, and shopping malls, all within proximity. Baner is close to many IT parks such as Pune IT Park, Rajiv Gandhi Infotech Park. It is also close to Industrial hubs such as PCMC and Pirangut. Baner is also known as Pune’s most glamorous neighborhood. Many residential and commercial projects are coming up at Baner. Baner is being developed under Smart City Mission and a proposed 23.3 km Metro line is also planned on Line 3.

Balewadi is a fast developing upcoming locality in north west Pune and is next to the upcoming localities of Hinjewadi,Baner, Aundh, Pimple Saudagar and Aundh. The Rajiv Gandhi Infotech Park and a good number of business, industrial and commercial parks in the region have driven the demand for good housing in this area. The Mumbai and the Nashik highways are close to this locality. Balewadi has problems of water logging, traffic jams, parking problems as well as irregular water. The PCMC municipal corporation is aware of these issues along with the shortcomings of transport infrastructure and a 1000 acre comprising Balewadi has been identified for infrastructure development at a cost of Rs 2200 crores. Residential accommodation is at a high demand due to the presence of so many parks and 2 and 3 Bedroom apartments are the most preferred accommodation here. Most of the accommodation is available here at an average cost of Rs 10000 to Rs 12000 per sq foot. The metro is developing in the main city of Pune and the next phase will cover the areas of Balewadi upto Hinjewadi and be a big boost to further development in the area.

Viman Nagar is a prominent locality in the north-western part of Pune extremely close to the Pune airport. The locality has got its name due to its proximity to the airport. It is considered to be a posh locality. It is a premium residential hub offering an ample number of units in a wide variety of price ranges. There are several projects under construction around this locality as well. All basic necessities like schools, hospitals, transport, etc are available in close range for the residents of the locality. Some of the surrounding localities include Sanjay Park, Kargil Vijay Nagar, and Mhada Colony. Viman Nagar ConnectivityThere are various hotels available in close range of the locality owing to its close proximity to the airport. The roads are well-maintained in this area and connectivity is not an issue for the residents. The Aga Khan Palace, which is a popular landmark of Pune is just a few kilometers away from Viman Nagar. Real estate in Viman Nagar There are a variety of residential complexes, independent houses, and villas located in Viman Nagar. Residential options include 1 BHK, 2 BHK, and 3 BHK flats and apartments in mid-rise & high-rise towers across various price ranges. Moreover, there are multiple commercial and office spaces available which can be customized to meet the specific requirements of any business.

Lohegaon is a developing locality situated in Pune. The pin code of Lohegaon is 411047 and postal head office is Lohogaon. Sai Nagar, Uttareshwar Nagar, Sant Nagar, Sathe Nagar, Gurudwara Colony are the nearby localities to Lohegaon. The Pune International airport is situated in Lohegaon. Many IT parks are very close to this locality like Viman Nagar IT Park, Kharadi IT zone. Lohegaon doesn’t face any load sheading since a long time. Phoenix Market City is at a walking distance from the locality and is the preferred shopping zone for all the local people. There is no water scarcity in this region. The locality is quite developed with parks and recreational area for kids and adults. Day to day commodities can easily be obtained from the local departmental stores in Lohegaon. Lohegaon has good road connectivity to all parts of Pune. Schools and colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many new residential and commercial projects led by Panchsheel developers. Bachelors prefer this area as the locality is close to commercial zone and has low cost of living.

About Shravani Garden Society
Elite housing project Shravani Garden Society is developed by a reputed builder and is located in Viman Nagar, Pune. Beautiful, comfortable and elagant residences are available in the project. Power back-up and other amenities that provide convenience of living are available in the complex. Owners of the apartments which are put up for sale can be contacted for the purchase. Viman Nagar is an affluent area in Pune. It is located close to areas like Dhanori, Lohegaon, Chandan Nagar, Kharadi, Ramwadi, Kalyani Nagar and Tingre Nagar are its neighboring localities. The area has a well-developed infrastructure with many reputed schools, educational institutes, and hospitals established here. Malls, restaurants, banks, and other utility shops are also located in the vicinity. Some notable schools in the area are Little Millennium, Young Legends Preschool, Rosary Jr. College, Viman Nagar - Rosary Education Group, Headstart Preparatory School, EuroKids, Lexicon Kids, Wunderbar Kids Pre School and Daycare, Anand Vidhya Niketan High School, Little Flower Open School, Vidya Niketan, Little Millennium Pre-School Viman Nagar. Some established hospitals in the area are Jeewan Jyot Hospital, Dr. Ganorkars Multispeciality Homeopathy, Pets Friends Clinic, Miracles Health Clinic, Kedarnath Hospital, Jeevan Deep Diabetes and Heart Care Center, Vibhute Hospital, Jeevan Deep Hospital and several others. Viman Nagar is well-connected to other areas by a robust network of roads. The locality is surrounded by New Airport Road, Old Airport Road, Lohegaon Road, Samrat Ashok and Pune Nagar Road these help in connecting Viman Nagar with all the neighboring areas. It is a comfortable locality to own a residential place.

Aundh is a well developed residential area in the north western fringes of Pune. The area is close to the Savitribai Phule Pune University, the education hub of Pune and the IT and business parks along the Mubai Pune highway as well as Hinjewadi. The area is well developed and there is a good infrastructure of markets, schools, institutes, shopping malls and hospitals. All these facilities and the proximity of IT, business, industrial and education hubs have driven the demand for housing and Aundh is fast turning into a full fledged residential hub. 88% of the property available in Aundh are 2, 3 and 4 bedroom apartments. The rates vary from Rs 5000 to Rs 40000 per sq. foot. There are 27 new projects including 4 still under construction. Pune is a growing city th that is rapidly developing into a metro and the demand for housing is ever increasing. Areas such as Aundh, Baner and Pimple Saudagar are preferred locations for housing. Some of the well known builders with projects in the area include Pristine properties, Naiknavare Developers, Nanadan Buildcon Pvt. Ltd., Pinnacle Group and Sanskriti Lifespace.

Kharadi is a rapidly developing area located on the eastern side of Pune, Maharashtra. It gained recognition due to its proximity to the industrial hub of EON IT Park, which made it a coveted residential and commercial hub. It is also home to a number of IT parks, commercial complexes, retail stores, and entertainment outlets, making it a highly sought-after area in Pune. The area has seen a huge growth in the number of residential projects over the past few years. With its growing infrastructure, Kharadi is an attractive destination for professionals and families from all walks of life. The area offers excellent amenities such as shopping malls, supermarkets, healthcare, educational institutions, and entertainment zones, making it one of the most preferred areas of Pune.

There are IT and business hubs close by and keep boosting the demand for more housing in the area. 90% of the property available in Wadgaon Sheri are apartments including builder floors. 94% of all the available apartments include 1,2 and 3 BHKs. There are 12 new residential projects under way in Wadgaon Sheri and 4 of these projects are still under construction. Purchase and rental rates are high though some 2 bedroom apartments can be obtained on a rent as low as Rs 4000. Some of the well known builders making residential projects in Wadgaon Sheri include Brahmacorp Ltd,.the Anandtara group and the Gurukripa group. There are issues such as water shortage and garbage collection that need to be regularised

Nigdi is an upcoming township situated in Pimpri-Chinchwad region of Pune, Maharashtra. The pin code of Nigdi is 411044 and postal head office is Yamunanagar. Swami Samarth Nagar, sector 26, Pradhikaran, Sector 25 are the nearby localities to Nigdi. The locality is close to the famous Hinjewadi IT Park and has low cost of living compared to other major localities in Pune. Nigdi is close to Mumbai Pune Expressway and Lonavala which is a hill station can be easily reached from here. Nigdi has good schools and colleges at a walking distance which makes it easy for the kids to get their education. Marathi is the local language here; people also speak English and Hindi. Nigdi is very well connected to other major localities by roadways. Banks and ATM`s are located at a close distance from the locality. Nigdi doesn’t face the issue of water logging as the drainage facilities in this region are very good and well maintained. There is a petrol pump situated opposite to the locality. Nigdi Police station is situated within the locality making it safe and Secure.

It was established in the mid 19th century by the name of "Bibvewadi" and over the years has grown and developed into a residential area. It is known for its verdant setting and is the home to a unique blend of cultures and communities. It has a mix of traditional and contemporary architecture. It is one of the oldest areas in Pune and has always been a close-knit community. Bibwewadi is an educational hub, with several renowned schools and colleges like AISSMS, Pune Institute of Computer Technology (PICT), Suryadatta Institute of Management, and many others. The area is well connected to the rest of Pune city and enjoys good transport facilities like buses and autos. Bibwewadi is also known to be a go-to place for shopping. There are a few malls, multiplexes and supermarkets spread out across the area, offering a plethora of items at affordable prices. There are also numerous restaurants in Bibwewadi, serving cuisines from across the globe. There are a number of places of worship too. People from various religions find a home in Bibwewadi and it is a place where people of all faiths and backgrounds can come together in peace and harmony. Bibwewadi is a unique place with its history, culture, and people. With its idyllic setting, it provides a safe and secure environment that is ideal for a comfortable and convenient lifestyle.

Bhugaon is a suburban locality situated in Pune, Maharashtra. Paud Road , Siddhivinayak Vihar , Ptanjali Patil Nagar , Mokai V Asti , Gloria are the nearby Localities to Bhugaon. 2 BHK and 1 BHK are the common room design in this area. Mulshi road passes through this locality and the Mumbai Pune Expressway is very near to the locality. Bhugaon has good connectivity to Hinjewadi IT Park and Wakad commercial estate. There are no load sheading issues in this region. Bhugaon is surrounded by dense forest which provides good green cover to the locality. Manas Lake is a famous tourist attraction which is situated adjacent to the locality. There are no cellular connectivity issues in this locality. Bhugaon has an active night life with many clubs and pubs open till late night. Schools and Colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many of the IT companies are expanding their offices in this region due to low land rates and better connectivity making it easier for the employees to get to office.

Lohegaon is a developing locality situated in Pune. The pin code of Lohegaon is 411047 and postal head office is Lohogaon. Sai Nagar, Uttareshwar Nagar, Sant Nagar, Sathe Nagar, Gurudwara Colony are the nearby localities to Lohegaon. The Pune International airport is situated in Lohegaon. Many IT parks are very close to this locality like Viman Nagar IT Park, Kharadi IT zone. Lohegaon doesn’t face any load sheading since a long time. Phoenix Market City is at a walking distance from the locality and is the preferred shopping zone for all the local people. There is no water scarcity in this region. The locality is quite developed with parks and recreational area for kids and adults. Day to day commodities can easily be obtained from the local departmental stores in Lohegaon. Lohegaon has good road connectivity to all parts of Pune. Schools and colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many new residential and commercial projects led by Panchsheel developers. Bachelors prefer this area as the locality is close to commercial zone and has low cost of living.

Gultekdi is an upcoming region in the cultural center of Maharashtra, in the city of Pune. The region enjoys smooth connectivity with the various points in the city and other parts of the state through efficient roadways that pass around and through it like the Jawaharlal Nehru Road, Iravati Karve Marg, Kushaba Zanjale Road and Bibwewadi Kondhwa Road. Owing to the network of these roads, the area also gets connected with the Pune ‚Äì Bangalore Highway at a short away distance from here. The Pune Railway Station is easily accessible from here. There are many prestigious educational institutions within the vicinity of the area like AMOR Pune Steiner School, Crescent School, KPES Jawaharlal English School, VIIT, Sunbeam Institute of Information Technology and B.J. Medical College among many others. There is a plethora of medical facilities in this area for emergencies and special care of medical needs like Ranka Hospital, GB Indumati Manilal Khanna Hospital, Siddharth Hospital, Pune Adventist Hospital, Bodas Hospital, etc. Also, Rajul Park, Bhimale Udyan, Gool Poonawala Park are popular spots that adds to the beauty of the region.

Dhankawadi is a town located on the outskirts of Pune, Maharashtra. It offers several residential projects constructed by renowned builders. The nearby localities to Dhankawadi are Bibwewadi, Katraj, Rajiv Gandhi Nagar, Sai Nagar, Sahakar Nagar, Shivsai Colony, Bharati Vidyapeeth Campus, Dhankawadi, Shiv Colony, and Mohan Nagar. The nearby cities are Pune, Pimpri-Chinchwad, Sasvad, and Talegaon Dabhade. The area is covered by the jurisdiction of the Khadakwasala Assembly Constituency and the Baramati Parliamentary Constituency. The latitude and longitude of Dhankawadi are 18.4655°N and 73.8547°E, respectively. With an area of 3.16 sq km, Dhankawadi has a population of 74846, including 38602 males and 36244 females, with a population density of 23652 people per sq km (as per the records of 2020). The nearest post office is Dhankawadi Post Office, and the pin code is 411043. The primary local languages here are Marathi, Hindi, Kannada, and Marwari. The climate of Dhankawadi is tropical type of climate. The average yearly temperature is 24.3ºC. Dhankawadi generally receives 1200 mm of precipitation annually. April and January are the warmest and the coldest month, respectively. July receives the maximum rainfall, and January receives the minimum.

Bavdhan is a fast-growing suburban neighbourhood located in Pune's western outskirts. It is in close proximity to Pune's industrial zone and IT hubs. The neighbourhood is well-connected to the rest of Pune and has excellent civic facilities. The Pune Municipal Corporation has authority over this area. Bhugaon, Lavale, Kothrud, Warje, Pashan, Sunarwadi, Vadgaon Budruk, Shivane, Nanded, Baner, and Aundh are some of the major places around Bavdhan. The neighbourhood serves as the city's primary entrance point from the Mumbai-Bangalore highway, providing quick access to places like Paud Road, Aundh, Kothrud, Pashan, and University. The nearest train station is 13.5 kilometres away, while the airport is 25.4 kilometres away through Pashan Road. Bavdhan is well-equipped in terms of social services. Within the vicinity, there are super-speciality hospitals, educational institutions, retail malls, and convenience stores. Bavdhan is especially beautiful because it is bordered on three sides by hills and has the Pashan Lake to its north. Many reputable builders, such as the Nyati Group, Kolte-Patil Developers, and the Pride Group, are working on various projects in Bavdhan. Bavdhan offers a wide range of projects, from low-cost to high-end.

Bavdhan has good road transportation option available to all major areas
There are many private and public schools available in Bavdhan
There are few hotels that are open till late nights and provide service
What can be better

There are no ICSE schools in the locality and the nearest one is at a distance of 7 kmread more

Baner situated in North West Pune is a great blend of residential and commercial properties. Baner is surrounded by Balewadi, Aundh, Pashan, Sus, Mahalunge, Wakad, and Hinjewadi. Baner is a rapidly developing suburb in Pune due to its proximity to industrial zones and IT hubs. Hinjewadi’s development as an IT hub has boosted the rental hub at Baner. Hinjewadi IT Hub is just 9km from Baner. Baner also enjoys excellent road connectivity via Baner road, Pashan Sus road, and NH-48. Its proximity to the Mumbai-Pune expressway is an added advantage. Pune International Airport is just 18 km away from Baner and Shivajinagar Railway station is the nearest railway station. Baner has excellent social infrastructure as it is surrounded by well-known schools, hospitals, restaurants, and shopping malls, all within proximity. Baner is close to many IT parks such as Pune IT Park, Rajiv Gandhi Infotech Park. It is also close to Industrial hubs such as PCMC and Pirangut. Baner is also known as Pune’s most glamorous neighborhood. Many residential and commercial projects are coming up at Baner. Baner is being developed under Smart City Mission and a proposed 23.3 km Metro line is also planned on Line 3.

Pimple Nilakh is a neighborhood located in the city of Pune, India. It is situated in the eastern part of the city, near the Mula-Mutha River. The area is known for its pleasant climate, excellent infrastructure, and diverse population. Pimple Nilakh is a popular residential area with a large number of residential complexes. It is well-connected to other parts of the city with good roads. The area is also home to many educational institutions, healthcare centers, banks, and shopping malls. Pimple Nilakh is known for its vibrant culture and festivities. The area is home to several temples and shrines, which attract tourists and devotees from different parts of the world. The vibrant nightlife and the nearby Mulshi Lake make it a perfect spot for relaxation. The area is home to many international IT companies and business houses. The presence of a good number of IT parks and shopping malls makes Pimple Nilakh an attractive destination for business travelers. Lohegaon is a developing locality situated in Pune. The pin code of Lohegaon is 411047 and postal head office is Lohogaon. Sai Nagar, Uttareshwar Nagar, Sant Nagar, Sathe Nagar, Gurudwara Colony are the nearby localities to Lohegaon. The Pune International airport is situated in Lohegaon. Many IT parks are very close to this locality like Viman Nagar IT Park, Kharadi IT zone. Lohegaon doesn’t face any load sheading since a long time. Phoenix Market City is at a walking distance from the locality and is the preferred shopping zone for all the local people. There is no water scarcity in this region. The locality is quite developed with parks and recreational area for kids and adults. Day to day commodities can easily be obtained from the local departmental stores in Lohegaon. Lohegaon has good road connectivity to all parts of Pune. Schools and colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many new residential and commercial projects led by Panchsheel developers. Bachelors prefer this area as the locality is close to commercial zone and has low cost of living.
Read More
The Pune metro is being built from Lohegaon and will be completed by 2022
The service road from Lohegaon to Viman Nagar is being reconstructed to fill potholes
New commercial zone is being built behind Phoenix Marketcity
Many new residential buildings are being constructed nearby the IT Parks
Footover bridge is to be built on the Ahmednagar highway
What is good here
Lohegaon has good public transport options with government buses running at good frequencyread more
Tulip School is the most preferred school among the locals as the education here is quite goodread more
Many of the places in Lohegaon are open till late night and has an active night liferead more
What can be better
Buses are overcrowded as there is no mtero service in the area
No ICSE medium schools are present in the area
Its hard to get taxi`s and auto`s late at night from Lohegaon

Lohegaon is a developing locality situated in Pune. The pin code of Lohegaon is 411047 and postal head office is Lohogaon. Sai Nagar, Uttareshwar Nagar, Sant Nagar, Sathe Nagar, Gurudwara Colony are the nearby localities to Lohegaon. The Pune International airport is situated in Lohegaon. Many IT parks are very close to this locality like Viman Nagar IT Park, Kharadi IT zone. Lohegaon doesn’t face any load sheading since a long time. Phoenix Market City is at a walking distance from the locality and is the preferred shopping zone for all the local people. There is no water scarcity in this region. The locality is quite developed with parks and recreational area for kids and adults. Day to day commodities can easily be obtained from the local departmental stores in Lohegaon. Lohegaon has good road connectivity to all parts of Pune. Schools and colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many new residential and commercial projects led by Panchsheel developers. Bachelors prefer this area as the locality is close to commercial zone and has low cost of living.

Lohegaon is a developing locality situated in Pune. The pin code of Lohegaon is 411047 and postal head office is Lohogaon. Sai Nagar, Uttareshwar Nagar, Sant Nagar, Sathe Nagar, Gurudwara Colony are the nearby localities to Lohegaon. The Pune International airport is situated in Lohegaon. Many IT parks are very close to this locality like Viman Nagar IT Park, Kharadi IT zone. Lohegaon doesn’t face any load sheading since a long time. Phoenix Market City is at a walking distance from the locality and is the preferred shopping zone for all the local people. There is no water scarcity in this region. The locality is quite developed with parks and recreational area for kids and adults. Day to day commodities can easily be obtained from the local departmental stores in Lohegaon. Lohegaon has good road connectivity to all parts of Pune. Schools and colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many new residential and commercial projects led by Panchsheel developers. Bachelors prefer this area as the locality is close to commercial zone and has low cost of living.
Read More
The Pune metro is being built from Lohegaon and will be completed by 2022
The service road from Lohegaon to Viman Nagar is being reconstructed to fill potholes
New commercial zone is being built behind Phoenix Marketcity
Many new residential buildings are being constructed nearby the IT Parks
Footover bridge is to be built on the Ahmednagar highway
What is good here
Lohegaon has good public transport options with government buses running at good frequencyread more
Tulip School is the most preferred school among the locals as the education here is quite goodread more
Many of the places in Lohegaon are open till late night and has an active night liferead more
What can be better
Buses are overcrowded as there is no mtero service in the area
No ICSE medium schools are present in the area
Its hard to get taxi`s and auto`s late at night from Lohegaon

Undri is a residential neighborhood in Pune's southeast. Undri, Pune combines the pleasures of being close to nature with the conveniences of city life. Pune, Saswad, Pimpri-Chinchwad, and Talegaon Dabhade are nearby cities to Undri, Pune. Undri is well-connected to all parts of Pune via NH-65, Hadapsar Road, NIBM Road, and Kondhwa Road. The connectivity of the locality is improved even more by the accessibility of numerous kinds of public transit such as buses, taxis, and auto-rickshaws. Undri offers various projects by top developers such as Ranjeet Developers, Kolte Patil Developers Ltd., Mantra Properties, Majestique Landmarks, Amit Enterprises Promoters, and Builders Pvt. Ltd., and Goel Ganga Development. There are various restaurants, parks, temples, and clubs in and around Undri.Undri offers a range of property types, including inexpensive apartments, residential plots, and villas. Undri has ready-to-move-in flats as well as under-construction projects. Undri is a good choice for residential and commercial purposes. There are many residential projects such as Vishwakarma Vedant, Kolte Patil Centria, and Antara. Undri is around 10-15 kilometers from vital IT hubs like Hadapsar, Phursungi, and Kharadi. In short, Undri is an ideal choice for families as well as students.

Locality Guide
for Camp, Pune
Share

34 More
Pune Cantt also called as Camp, is a military cantonment situated in Pune city of India. The cantonment locality houses several military establishments. The area is a popular shopping locations along with MG Road and East Street. The Indian Army headquarters of Southern Command is also placed in Pune Cantonment. The locality is proximity to healthcenters like Munot Heart Care and Research Centre and Jehangir Hospital. Camp area has several excellent schools like St Mary's School and Rewachand Bhojwani Academy. Camp residents can freely enjoy the dual elements of city-life and an ecologically excellent environment in lush greenery. It is well-connected to the important Pune hotspots for shopping, recreation, business and employment. Camp residents gets benefit from the nearby locality reputation as an education hub and Pune is one of the country fastest-growing metropolises. Camp is flanked by several malls, condominiums, restaurants, eateries, cafes, schools, hospitals, clinics, parks, and entertainment zones along with well-planned residential and commercial spots. The area offers a massive religious and cultural diversity which seems the essence of Camp's cosmopolitan fabric. Attracting the crowded and being an old part of Pune, Camp has vast swathes of some of the Pune's best amenities. It is a self-sufficient convenient locality. Marathi is the local language here.

What is good here
The Camp area is just 3 km away from Pune Junction Railway Station- Pune's core rail station and Pune International Airport is only around 10 km away via Pune - Ahmednagar Highwayread more

Presence of several parks with a few famous names like Muredha Nala Park and Rani Laxmibai Garden makes Camp a better place to own a livingread more
What can be better
Other than the public buses, Camp residents have to rely on auto-rickshaws for local travel due to large populationread more
Few areas seem deserted at night due to lack of street lights and faulty lights
Few parks need maintainence for residents to walk and carry out other activities

Nigdi is an upcoming township situated in Pimpri-Chinchwad region of Pune, Maharashtra. The pin code of Nigdi is 411044 and postal head office is Yamunanagar. Swami Samarth Nagar, sector 26, Pradhikaran, Sector 25 are the nearby localities to Nigdi. The locality is close to the famous Hinjewadi IT Park and has low cost of living compared to other major localities in Pune. Nigdi is close to Mumbai Pune Expressway and Lonavala which is a hill station can be easily reached from here. Nigdi has good schools and colleges at a walking distance which makes it easy for the kids to get their education. Marathi is the local language here; people also speak English and Hindi. Nigdi is very well connected to other major localities by roadways. Banks and ATM`s are located at a close distance from the locality. Nigdi doesn’t face the issue of water logging as the drainage facilities in this region are very good and well maintained. There is a petrol pump situated opposite to the locality. Nigdi Police station is situated within the locality making it safe and Secure.

The neighbourhood is located to the West-Central region of the city. During the recent times, Kothrud has seen a rapid expansion as well as development in commercial and residential real estate. Kothrud has expanded its territory to Karve Nagar and Dahanukar Colony in the South, Bavdhan or Chandani Chowk in the North and the West, whole of Erandwane in the East. The locality has schools like City International School, Paranjape Vidya Mandir, Millenium National School, New India School. The area has many nursing homes, hospitals and dispensaries like Shashwat Hospital, Deoyani Multi Speciality Hospital and Krishna Hospital. It also has many colleges like Maharashtra Institute of Pharmacy, Bhartiya Vidyapeeth New Law College, MIT School of Government and College of Fire Engineering and Safety and the locality has many markets both at the retail and commercial office segments. Why is Kothrud famous? Kothrud is famous because of its landmarks such as Mrityunjaya Temple dating to the Peshwa times. This is also the residence place of Mastani. Several prominent citizens of Pune, who are active in Bollywood, Marathi Cinema, Media, Cricket and Politics reside in this area. Is kothrud a good area in Pune Kothrud is a great place to live in Pune. It's close to IT parks, is well-connected to the city and other areas, and has many good schools, shopping complexes and other amenities.

Lohegaon is a developing locality situated in Pune. The pin code of Lohegaon is 411047 and postal head office is Lohogaon. Sai Nagar, Uttareshwar Nagar, Sant Nagar, Sathe Nagar, Gurudwara Colony are the nearby localities to Lohegaon. The Pune International airport is situated in Lohegaon. Many IT parks are very close to this locality like Viman Nagar IT Park, Kharadi IT zone. Lohegaon doesn’t face any load sheading since a long time. Phoenix Market City is at a walking distance from the locality and is the preferred shopping zone for all the local people. There is no water scarcity in this region. The locality is quite developed with parks and recreational area for kids and adults. Day to day commodities can easily be obtained from the local departmental stores in Lohegaon. Lohegaon has good road connectivity to all parts of Pune. Schools and colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many new residential and commercial projects led by Panchsheel developers. Bachelors prefer this area as the locality is close to commercial zone and has low cost of living.
Read More
The Pune metro is being built from Lohegaon and will be completed by 2022
The service road from Lohegaon to Viman Nagar is being reconstructed to fill potholes
New commercial zone is being built behind Phoenix Marketcity
Many new residential buildings are being constructed nearby the IT Parks
Footover bridge is to be built on the Ahmednagar highway

Lohegaon has good public transport options with government buses running at good frequencyread more

Buses are overcrowded as there is no mtero service in the area
No ICSE medium schools are present in the area
Its hard to get taxi`s and auto`s late at night from Lohegaon

Locality Guide
for Mohammed Wadi, Pune
Share
+
25 More
Nestled among hills and lush greenery, Mohammed Wadi is one of the fastest developing suburbs of Pune. Close to nature with picturesque surroundings, it is a coherent residential property destination. The location has an advantage of being well connected to various key localities in Pune via local as well as interstate highways and expressways. With the development of MG Road, NH-4 and NH-9; the residents enjoy an easy access to workplace hubs like Hadapsar and the IT Park in Phursungi. The most vital road of the place, NIBM Road connects Mohammed Wadi to significant destinations like Pune International Airport, Pune Railway Station and Bus Depot. With the widening of Katraj-Kondhwa-Phursungi-Solapur Highway, Mohammed Wadi's all-round connectivity is increasing dramatically. Proximity to Wanowrie and other major IT companies is boosting the infrastructure development of the place even further. The SP Infocity and Magarpatta city is just a short drive from the locality thus prompting many working professionals to reside around Mohammed Wadi. Reputed educational institutions like DPS, Bishops and Singhad Institutes are just a stone's throw away from the area. Mohammed Wadi also offers a myriad of entertainment and leisure options in terms of Seasons Mall, Amanora Park Town and Corinthian's Club located in the vicinity.

Lohegaon is a developing locality situated in Pune. The pin code of Lohegaon is 411047 and postal head office is Lohogaon. Sai Nagar, Uttareshwar Nagar, Sant Nagar, Sathe Nagar, Gurudwara Colony are the nearby localities to Lohegaon. The Pune International airport is situated in Lohegaon. Many IT parks are very close to this locality like Viman Nagar IT Park, Kharadi IT zone. Lohegaon doesn’t face any load sheading since a long time. Phoenix Market City is at a walking distance from the locality and is the preferred shopping zone for all the local people. There is no water scarcity in this region. The locality is quite developed with parks and recreational area for kids and adults. Day to day commodities can easily be obtained from the local departmental stores in Lohegaon. Lohegaon has good road connectivity to all parts of Pune. Schools and colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many new residential and commercial projects led by Panchsheel developers. Bachelors prefer this area as the locality is close to commercial zone and has low cost of living.

Footover bridge is to be built on the Ahmednagar highway

What can be better
Buses are overcrowded as there is no mtero service in the area
No ICSE medium schools are present in the area
Its hard to get taxi`s and auto`s late at night from Lohegaon

Nerhe is a popular suburb in the Cultural Capital of Maharashtra, Pune. It lies nearby to Mumbai Pune Bypass Road which further connects it with other major cities. The nearest Railway Station is Akurdi. The Pune International Airport is located at a short distance from here which lessens the distance and time of traveling different cities or abroad. It is neighbored Marunji, Jambhe, Kasarsai and Sangavade. The famous and beautiful Payana River flows adjacent to this place. A number of temples, banks, ATMs, hospitals, schools, colleges, commercial offices, gourmets, malls and many more urban features are located in and around this place which adds to its credential and helps in modifying the skyline of the city.

Locality Guide
for Wanowrie, Pune
Share
+
14 More
Wanowrie is a neighborhood in Pune that is hugely gaining popularity among the city's populace owing to its strong connectivity advantages. Located alluringly close to the picturesque surroundings of Undri, Wanowrie is steadily coming across as a coherent residential property destination. The location has an advantage of being well connected to various key localities in Pune via local as well as interstate highways and expressways. With the development of MG Road, NH-4 and NH-9, the residents enjoy an easy access to workplace hubs like Hadapsar and the IT Park in Phursungi. The most vital road of the place, NIBM Road connects Wanowrie to significant destinations like Pune International Airport, Pune Railway Station and Bus Depot. With the widening of Katraj-Kondhwa-Phursungi-Solapur Highway, all-round connectivity of the locality is increasing dramatically. Proximity to Mohammadwadi and other major IT companies is boosting the infrastructure development of the place even further. The SP Infocity and Magarpatta city is just a short drive from the locality thus prompting many working professionals to reside around Mohammadwadi. Reputed educational institutions like DPS, Bishops and Singhad Institutes are just a stone's throw away from the area. Wanowrie also offers a myriad of entertainment and leisure options in terms of Seasons Mall, Amanora Park Town and Corinthian's Club located in the vicinity.

Alandi is known to be a well-developed and upscale residential locality in northern Pune, Maharashtra, India. Alandi is most well known for its religious significance and witnesses a flock of tourists every year for pilgrimage. The locality has a huge significance for Marathi Saint Dnyaneshwar, and the Hindus believe the saint to be still alive. The Ekadashi, Kartik festival, and Pandarpur vari attract tons of Hindu devotees to this place every year. The city is also famous for its wedding venues, and it witnesses almost 300-400 marriages during the Hindu wedding season. The Indrayani river flows through the city and has its own special significance too. Devotees often dip themselves in this river as a part of their pilgrimage, and since this river owns of religious importance, no fishing takes place. The total population of the city is 28,576, of which the males are around 56% of the total population and females constitute 44%. The main language spoken here is Marathi. Alandi road, Sant Dnyaneshwar Marg, Pune Nashik Road, and spine road hold the major connectivity to major cities around. Pune International airport is located around 16 km away, and Kasarwadi railway station is around 14 km away.

Wanowrie is a neighborhood in Pune that is hugely gaining popularity among the city's populace owing to its strong connectivity advantages. Located alluringly close to the picturesque surroundings of Undri, Wanowrie is steadily coming across as a coherent residential property destination. The location has an advantage of being well connected to various key localities in Pune via local as well as interstate highways and expressways. With the development of MG Road, NH-4 and NH-9, the residents enjoy an easy access to workplace hubs like Hadapsar and the IT Park in Phursungi. The most vital road of the place, NIBM Road connects Wanowrie to significant destinations like Pune International Airport, Pune Railway Station and Bus Depot. With the widening of Katraj-Kondhwa-Phursungi-Solapur Highway, all-round connectivity of the locality is increasing dramatically. Proximity to Mohammadwadi and other major IT companies is boosting the infrastructure development of the place even further. The SP Infocity and Magarpatta city is just a short drive from the locality thus prompting many working professionals to reside around Mohammadwadi. Reputed educational institutions like DPS, Bishops and Singhad Institutes are just a stone's throw away from the area. Wanowrie also offers a myriad of entertainment and leisure options in terms of Seasons Mall, Amanora Park Town and Corinthian's Club located in the vicinity.

Lohegaon is a developing locality situated in Pune. The pin code of Lohegaon is 411047 and postal head office is Lohogaon. Sai Nagar, Uttareshwar Nagar, Sant Nagar, Sathe Nagar, Gurudwara Colony are the nearby localities to Lohegaon. The Pune International airport is situated in Lohegaon. Many IT parks are very close to this locality like Viman Nagar IT Park, Kharadi IT zone. Lohegaon doesn’t face any load sheading since a long time. Phoenix Market City is at a walking distance from the locality and is the preferred shopping zone for all the local people. There is no water scarcity in this region. The locality is quite developed with parks and recreational area for kids and adults. Day to day commodities can easily be obtained from the local departmental stores in Lohegaon. Lohegaon has good road connectivity to all parts of Pune. Schools and colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many new residential and commercial projects led by Panchsheel developers. Bachelors prefer this area as the locality is close to commercial zone and has low cost of living.

Developer Profile
Paranjape Schemes (Construction) Ltd was incorporated in September 1987 and has built a large portfolio of properties in residential, commercial, township, hospitality, institutes, entertainment, senior-living and SEZ segments. With extensive experience of over 30 years, the developer has played a pivotal role in changing the skyline of western Maharashtra with over 170 projects in the luxury and affordable segment. In addition to its presence in Pune, Nashik, Ratnagiri, Chiplun and Kolhapur, the company develops properties in coveted metropolises like Bengaluru in Karnataka and Vadodara in Gujarat.
Paranjape Schemes has been a trusted name among its wide customer base of 11,000 families owing to its comprehensive and reliable property solutions.
Experience and Strengths
Paranjape Schemes, under the leadership of its Chairman, Shrikant Purushottam Paranjape, and Managing Director, Shashank Paranjape, has made remarkable progress in building its overall capability. Shrikant is one of the few ﬁnancial experts in the real estate sector and the President of CREDAI Pune. The builder has worked closely and maintained excellent relations with all its stakeholders, associates as well as customers to provide the right housing solution as per the lifestyle needs of homebuyers. It exhibits integrity, transparency and professionalism in delivering services of an outstanding standard. The Paranjape family has a legacy of over 60 years in real estate business and displays a commitment to carrying forward the company’s mission and values to the next generations for achieving new milestones.
Paranjape Schemes has spearheaded the Aastha and Athashri projects which are India’s largest senior housing community or integrated townships equipped with premium facilities for a comfortable lifestyle. These, along with the over 171 top-of-the-line residential projects by the developer, have sustained its steadily rising success graph. The apartments developed by the builder provides a family with all the essential features including modern amenities, well-planned designs and a sustainable environment. Paranjape Schemes uses a cognitive approach to designing and planning of all its projects with great attention to details. The residential spaces are designed to maximise lighting and have ample greenery all around.
Projects

Many IT parks are very close to this locality like Viman Nagar IT Park, Kharadi IT zone. Lohegaon doesn’t face any load sheading since a long time. Phoenix Market City is at a walking distance from the locality and is the preferred shopping zone for all the local people. There is no water scarcity in this region. The locality is quite developed with parks and recreational area for kids and adults. Day to day commodities can easily be obtained from the local departmental stores in Lohegaon. Lohegaon has good road connectivity to all parts of Pune. Schools and colleges are at a walking distance making it easy for the kids to get their education. Many new residential and commercial projects led by Panchsheel developers. Bachelors prefer this area as the locality is close to commercial zone and has low cost of living.

Locality Guide
for Vadgaon Budruk, Pune
Share

9 More
About 8 kilometers separate Vadgaon Budruk Village from Pune's city core. Before 1990, the village's primary economic activity was farming, and it was quite small. The western hills' catchment area provides Vadgaon Budruk with fertile soil and ample water for farming. Vadgaon is the name given to the village because it contains many "Vad" or Banyan trees. Vadgaon Budruk, which has a thick forest close to parts of a river and a creek, served as one of the pauses for sheep traveling from the Konkan to areas inland. Direct connectivity between the city of Pune and the Sinhgad fort can be regarded as occurring at Vadgaon Budruk. It is well-known for the Sinhgad Institute and well-liked by families from middle-class backgrounds. As many IT and BPO personnel live in the region, it is now a well-known location in the IT sector. After 2005, Vadgaon Budruk underwent a substantial transformation as the population of Pune increased significantly. The ecology suffered with the transition from a village to a suburb. Fertile grounds and a significant portion of the woodland were transformed into tar and concrete apartment buildings. Most of the land in Vadgaon Budruk is currently taken up by apartment buildings. This is a key support system for Pune's middle class.

Katraj is a developing locality situated on the outskirts of Pune. The pin code of Katraj is 411046 and postal head office is Katraj. Sukhsagar Nagar, Rajas Society, Karadi are the nearby localities to Katraj. Marathi is the local language in this region; people also speak Hindi and English. Katraj is quite near to the famous Yerwada IT Park and Karadi IT Park. Many good clinics and hospitals are at close proximity from Katraj. There is no water scarcity as there are 3 over head water tanks built in this region. Katraj Zoo is a famous tourist spot in Pune and has many birds and animals here. The Old Mumbai Pune highway passes through Katraj. All the buses going to South India has a halt at Katraj. There is good cellular connectivity in Katraj which is of prime importance as many people are working from home during pandemic. Katraj has good connectivity to all parts of Pune via roadways. There are no load sheading issues in Katraj since a long time. Banks and ATM`s are situated at close proximity from the locality.

Bibwewadi is a residential locality situated in the city of Pune in India. It was established in the mid 19th century by the name of "Bibvewadi" and over the years has grown and developed into a residential area. It is known for its verdant setting and is the home to a unique blend of cultures and communities. It has a mix of traditional and contemporary architecture. It is one of the oldest areas in Pune and has always been a close-knit community. Bibwewadi is an educational hub, with several renowned schools and colleges like AISSMS, Pune Institute of Computer Technology (PICT), Suryadatta Institute of Management, and many others. The area is well connected to the rest of Pune city and enjoys good transport facilities like buses and autos. Bibwewadi is also known to be a go-to place for shopping. There are a few malls, multiplexes and supermarkets spread out across the area, offering a plethora of items at affordable prices. There are also numerous restaurants in Bibwewadi, serving cuisines from across the globe. There are a number of places of worship too. People from various religions find a home in Bibwewadi and it is a place where people of all faiths and backgrounds can come together in peace and harmony. Bibwewadi is a unique place with its history, culture, and people. With its idyllic setting, it provides a safe and secure environment that is ideal for a comfortable and convenient lifestyle.

Baner situated in North West Pune is a great blend of residential and commercial properties. Baner is surrounded by Balewadi, Aundh, Pashan, Sus, Mahalunge, Wakad, and Hinjewadi. Baner is a rapidly developing suburb in Pune due to its proximity to industrial zones and IT hubs. Hinjewadi’s development as an IT hub has boosted the rental hub at Baner. Hinjewadi IT Hub is just 9km from Baner. Baner also enjoys excellent road connectivity via Baner road, Pashan Sus road, and NH-48. Its proximity to the Mumbai-Pune expressway is an added advantage. Pune International Airport is just 18 km away from Baner and Shivajinagar Railway station is the nearest railway station. Baner has excellent social infrastructure as it is surrounded by well-known schools, hospitals, restaurants, and shopping malls, all within proximity. Baner is close to many IT parks such as Pune IT Park, Rajiv Gandhi Infotech Park. It is also close to Industrial hubs such as PCMC and Pirangut. Baner is also known as Pune’s most glamorous neighborhood. Many residential and commercial projects are coming up at Baner. Baner is being developed under Smart City Mission and a proposed 23.3 km Metro line is also planned on Line 3.

Chikhali is primarily an industrial area in the northern suburbs of Pune and is near the upmarket localities of Pimple Sudagar, Bokwadi, Rupee Nagar and Pimpri Chinchwad. There are several IT, business and technoiogy parks in the area that not only provide employment to residents living in Chikhali but also keep up the demand for affordable housing. 86% of the property available in Chikhali are apartments and builder floors. 84% of all the apartments are 1 and 2 BHKs and are available for both sale as well as rents at affordable rates.There are 16 new residential projects underway in Chikhali and 7 of them are still under construction. The projects are by reputed builders that include the Essen group, Sonigraha Homes, Anjani Buildconn and the Aksha group. The Pune international airport and the Pune central railway station are both 23 kms from Chikhali. The entire region is undergoing infrastructural development and will have even better infrastructure in the coming years.

Wagholi is an upcoming residential locality in Pune right next to the Pune international airport. The area is developing very fast and there are mostly 2 BHK and 3 BHK apartments for sale in new projects at Rs. 6500 to Rs. 7500 per sq ft. There are good schools, markets, institutions, and industrial hubs, and tech parks nearby. 87% of the property available are multi-storeyed apartments while the remaining are in the form of residential plots and individual homes. There are also some 1 BHK apartments which are mostly available for rent. Wagholi has a historical significance and is named after an ancient Tiger temple and is also said to be the home of the famous Maratha warrior Sardar Pilajirao Changojirao Jadhav. Waghori is close to the mining hub and people from this sector prefer to live in this area. The area is well connected to the rest of Pune. The Pune Ahmedabad highway passes through Wagholi and connects it to the rest of Pune. The area has a good infrastructure of public transport and civic amenities but growth is haphazard mainly due to a part of this area being under the Gram Panchayat Cost of living in Wagholi Wagholi is considered one of the affordable localities in Pune. The cost of living in Wagholi is typically around 20,000-30,000 rupees a month. This includes rent, food, transportation, and other daily expenses.

Nestled among hills and lush greenery, Mohammed Wadi is one of the fastest developing suburbs of Pune. Close to nature with picturesque surroundings, it is a coherent residential property destination. The location has an advantage of being well connected to various key localities in Pune via local as well as interstate highways and expressways. With the development of MG Road, NH-4 and NH-9; the residents enjoy an easy access to workplace hubs like Hadapsar and the IT Park in Phursungi. The most vital road of the place, NIBM Road connects Mohammed Wadi to significant destinations like Pune International Airport, Pune Railway Station and Bus Depot. With the widening of Katraj-Kondhwa-Phursungi-Solapur Highway, Mohammed Wadi's all-round connectivity is increasing dramatically. Proximity to Wanowrie and other major IT companies is boosting the infrastructure development of the place even further. The SP Infocity and Magarpatta city is just a short drive from the locality thus prompting many working professionals to reside around Mohammed Wadi. Reputed educational institutions like DPS, Bishops and Singhad Institutes are just a stone's throw away from the area. Mohammed Wadi also offers a myriad of entertainment and leisure options in terms of Seasons Mall, Amanora Park Town and Corinthian's Club located in the vicinity.

Locality Guide
for Bavdhan, Pune

Locality Overview Video

29 More
Bavdhan is a fast-growing suburban neighbourhood located in Pune's western outskirts. It is in close proximity to Pune's industrial zone and IT hubs. The neighbourhood is well-connected to the rest of Pune and has excellent civic facilities. The Pune Municipal Corporation has authority over this area. Bhugaon, Lavale, Kothrud, Warje, Pashan, Sunarwadi, Vadgaon Budruk, Shivane, Nanded, Baner, and Aundh are some of the major places around Bavdhan. The neighbourhood serves as the city's primary entrance point from the Mumbai-Bangalore highway, providing quick access to places like Paud Road, Aundh, Kothrud, Pashan, and University. The nearest train station is 13.5 kilometres away, while the airport is 25.4 kilometres away through Pashan Road. Bavdhan is well-equipped in terms of social services. Within the vicinity, there are super-speciality hospitals, educational institutions, retail malls, and convenience stores. Bavdhan is especially beautiful because it is bordered on three sides by hills and has the Pashan Lake to its north. Many reputable builders, such as the Nyati Group, Kolte-Patil Developers, and the Pride Group, are working on various projects in Bavdhan. Bavdhan offers a wide range of projects, from low-cost to high-end.
